aboutPage.hero_desc: We are Egyptian Collections Co. (ECC), a leading Egyptian firm specializing in debt management, collection, and credit investigation since 2001. We provide reliable solutions for banks.

aboutPage.story_p2: Our experience of over 20 years has enabled us to achieve the best results for banks while maintaining the institution's reputation and full compliance with laws.

faqPage.hero_desc: Answers to the most common questions about collection and investigation services at Egyptian Collections Co. ECC.
faqPage.still_contact_desc: If you didn't find your answer, feel free to contact us directly.

collection.q: What collection services does ECC provide?
collection.a: We offer 3 main types: Field Collection (field visits to customers), Office Collection (phone follow-up), and Legal Collection (legal procedures). All services are executed with the highest standards of professionalism and confidentiality.

collection.q: Is collection based on a fixed fee or percentage?
collection.a: We work on a fee basis as per the contract with each bank. Details require contact with the contracts department.

collection.q: How many governorates do you operate in?
collection.a: Our branches are located in 6 governorates: Giza (Dokki), Monufia, Beheira, Minya, Ismailia, and Qena. We cover all governorates through our field team.
We achieve collection rates exceeding 85% within the first 3 months of receiving cases, with periodic reports provided to banks.

collection.q: Do you work with individuals or only institutions?
collection.a: ECC works exclusively with banks, financial institutions, and major corporations. We do not provide services to individuals directly.

investigation.q: What's the difference between field and credit investigation?
investigation.a: Field investigation involves visiting the customer's address to verify their data and location. Credit investigation assesses creditworthiness based on available information.
We provide investigation reports certified by the company, which are accepted by the banks and entities we work with.
We pride ourselves on an accuracy rate exceeding 95% through trained teams and continuous quality monitoring.

investigation.q: Do you cover all of Egypt?
investigation.a: We cover all Egyptian governorates with a trained field team in each area.

privacyPage.hero_desc: At ECC, we deeply understand the sensitivity of "bank client data." Privacy and information security are not just words to us; they are the foundation of our work and part of our regulatory compliance.

intro.title: What data do we collect & why?
intro.desc: We are a "services" company, meaning our role is executive. The data we handle comes from two main sources:
intro.source1: Data from assigned Banks: Received under official mandate to perform investigation or collection tasks.
intro.source2: Data you provide: Such as sending your CV for recruitment or filling out a contact form.

cards.jobs_text: If you send us your CV, rest assured it stays with the HR department only and is used solely for recruitment purposes.
cards.ads_text: Data from ad forms is used solely to respond to your inquiries regarding our services.

sharing.title: Do we share your data?
sharing.text_body: We do not sell or rent data. Bank data is a red line, and applicant data is a trust we keep.

contact.title: Have an inquiry?
contact.desc: If you have any concerns regarding your data, feel free to call us or visit our headquarters.
contact.address: 30 Haroun St, El Mesaha Sq, Dokki

metadata.title: Egyptian Collections Co. ECC
metadata.description: Egyptian Collections Company (ECC) is a leader in field collection and credit investigation services in Egypt since 2001.

branchPage.hero_desc: Details and information about Egyptian Collections Co. ECC branch in
branchPage.services_desc: Our {{branch}} branch provides all collection and credit investigation services with the highest quality and professional standards.

faq.q1: What services are available at {{branch}} branch?
faq.a1: {{branch}} branch offers all field collection, office collection, and credit investigation services, in addition to employment opportunities in various departments.
faq.q2: How do I apply for a job at {{branch}} branch?
faq.a2: You can apply through our careers page by selecting your preferred branch, or visit the branch directly to submit your CV.
faq.q3: What are the working hours at {{branch}} branch?
faq.a3: Working hours are Saturday to Thursday from 8:30 AM to 6:30 PM.

collection.q: What is the difference between office and field collection?
collection.a: Office collection is done by phone from the company headquarters, while field collection involves visiting the client at their location. ECC provides both depending on each case.
Legal collection is handled by a specialized legal team, including official notices and legal procedures as agreed with the bank.

collection.q: Do you provide periodic reports to banks?
collection.a: We provide detailed periodic reports on each case, including follow-up history, actions taken, and results achieved.

investigation.q: How long does field investigation take?
investigation.a: We aim to complete the investigation visit within 24-48 hours of receiving the request, and provide the final report within 3 business days.
They include verification of residence and work addresses, business activity, updating contact information, and financial status assessment.

investigation.q: Why is client data verification important for banks?
investigation.a: Accurate data verification protects banks from fraud and helps correctly assess creditworthiness.
